TODO.TITLE: Task Management App
TODO.DESCRIPTION: A full-stack Trello-inspired task management application built with React and Express.js. Organize your work, alone or with team members, with workspaces, boards, columns, and cards using an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.

IMMO.TITLE: LogeFinder
IMMO.DESCRIPTION: This project is a web application that allows users to search for real estate listings in Belgium.

GITHUB.TITLE: GitHub Stats Viewer
GITHUB.DESCRIPTION: Cool web interface to visualize someone's Github activity. Made using Github API

ANTS.DESCRIPTION: GUI game made with Python, one of my first project

512.DESCRIPTION: Adaptation of the famous 2048 mobile game. Made in React.

SMALLTODO.TITLE: Todo List
SMALLTODO.DESCRIPTION: Simple todo list, with a back-end for persistent data. First app made with .NET

ABOUT.TITLE: about-me
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION:
Hello, I'm Dylan!

 I'm a self-taught front-end developer based in Bruxelles, Belgium. I can develop responsive websites from scratch and raise them into modern, user-friendly web experiences.

 Transforming ideas and designs into websites has been my passion for over a year now and I want to share it with the world. I have been helping various clients establish their online presence and I am always looking for new challenges.
 I am always eager to learn new technologies and improve my skills.

CONTACT.TITLE: contacts
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION:
I'm actively looking for a job in the development field, front-end is prefered but I'm open to do full-stack development as well.
However, I am also open to freelance opportunities.

If you are interested in working with me, please feel free to reach out.

FUN_FACTS.TITLE: my-fun-facts
FACTS: I never decline a game of chess
I find working out boring but I do it anyway

GOALS.TITLE: my goals
GOALS.DESCRIPTION1: My current goal is to save enough money to buy an old BMW and restore it during my free time.
GOALS.DESCRIPTION2: My second goal is to impress you enough that you want to work with me, which will bring me closer to my first goal!
